message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Class Diagram - SP02 CLASS DIAGRAM

skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle bold
skinparam classBackgroundColor White
skinparam classBorderColor Black
skinparam packageBackgroundColor #f0f0f0
skinparam packageBorderColor Black
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #ffffcc
skinparam noteBorderColor #cccc99

' Define stereotypes
class "Application" as Application <<C>>
class "AccountService" as AccountService <<C>>
class "RelationService" as RelationService <<C>>
class "TransactionService" as TransactionService <<C>>
class "CategoryService" as CategoryService <<C>>
class "FamilyService" as FamilyService <<C>>
class "Family" as Family <<C>>
class "FamilyMember" as FamilyMember <<C>>
class "Category" as Category <<I>>
class "Account" as Account <<I>>
class "Transaction" as Transaction <<I>>
class "AccountData" as AccountData <<C>>
class "MoneyValue" as MoneyValue <<C>>
class "Relation" as Relation <<C>>

' Packages
package "controllers" {
}

package "category" {
}

package "accounts" {
}

' Relationships
controllers --> Application
Application --> AccountService : has
Application --> RelationService : has
Application --> TransactionService : has
Application --> CategoryService : has
Application --> FamilyService : has

RelationService --> Category : implements
RelationService --> Relation : handles

CategoryService --> Category : handles
CategoryService --> Family : has list
CategoryService --> Relation : has list

FamilyService --> Family : has list
FamilyService --> FamilyMember : handles

Family --> FamilyMember : has list

AccountService --> AccountData : implements
AccountService --> Account : contains

TransactionService --> Transaction : handles
TransactionService --> AccountData : handles

AccountData --> Account : contains
AccountData --> Transaction : contains
AccountData --> MoneyValue : contains

Account --> Transaction : has list

@enduml
```
